items.title: Conversation at the Bookstore (1)
items.script:
W: Do you have the new edition of the writing guide?
M: Yes, but the paperback is sold out. The e-book is available.
W: Then I'll take the e-book. I need it for next week's class.
M: Great. I can email you the download link in two minutes.

questions.question: What will the woman probably do?

items.title: Announcement in the Gym (2)
items.script: Attention please. Due to maintenance, the swimming pool will close at 4 p.m. today. Morning swim classes are unaffected. Members may use the running track instead. We apologize for the inconvenience.
